name: FastEmbed (Qdrant)
pricing_notes: Free and open source; runs locally with no API costs

auth.notes: No auth required; fully local execution

performance.notes: ONNX Runtime optimized; 2-10x faster than HuggingFace Transformers for same models; CPU efficient

agent_readiness.notes: ONNX-optimized local embedding library. 50+ models (BAAI/bge, all-MiniLM, E5, etc.). Quantized models for CPU efficiency. Native Qdrant integration. Lazy model download on first use. No GPU required for many models.

gotchas: Model first-use download requires internet access and disk space
CPU performance still slower than GPU for large batches
Fewer cutting-edge models vs HuggingFace (but quality models available)
best_when: Privacy-sensitive workloads where embeddings cannot leave local machine
Cost-sensitive agents running embeddings at scale (no API fees)
High-throughput batch embedding on CPU without GPU
avoid_when: Need latest frontier embedding models not yet in FastEmbed
API-based systems that can't run local compute
Real-time embedding with very tight latency SLAs
summary: FastEmbed is Qdrant's ONNX-optimized local embedding library providing 2-10x speedup over HuggingFace Transformers for the same models. Supports 50+ models (BGE, E5, all-MiniLM, etc.), runs entirely locally (no API costs), and integrates natively with Qdrant vector store. Best for privacy-sensitive or cost-conscious embedding workflows that can run local compute.
